HGSS.658.0001:
This has to be the first time I’ve done
something like this from so close!\f
I mean talking on the phone!
HGSS.658.0002:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
Sorry to have kept you waiting!
We’ve finally opened the Safari Zone!\f
Do you know where it is?\f
You know the Gate inside the cavern in
Cianwood City?\f
If you go through there and walk for a
short while, you should soon see the\r
Safari Zone!\f
We’re a little out of the way, but
please come visit!

HGSS.658.0008:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
We’ve come up with new objects.\f
With these, you should be able to meet
lots of different Pokémon.\f
Do your best!
HGSS.658.0009:

HGSS.658.0010:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
We’ve come up with new objects!
There’re so many now!\f
With these new additions, that should be
plenty I think!\f
You should try placing a bunch of
different objects to see what different\r
Pokémon you can meet.
HGSS.658.0011:

HGSS.658.0012:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
I thought of a new way to play!
It’s called Object Arrangement!\f
...Wait...
Did I already tell you about this?\f
Well, we’ve got new objects for
Object Arrangement...\f
...I already told you about that,
too...\f
Well, that’s all right!
If you come to the Safari Zone, you’ll\r
see exactly what I’m talking about!\f
Well, see you there!

HGSS.658.0014:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
There’s been a change in the Pokémon in
the [0104,000A,0000], it seems...\f
After some time with the same objects
in the same Area, the kinds of Pokémon\r
that settle there change.\f
We’ve found that if you completely
remove the Area and then restore it\r
with the same objects, the original\r
Pokémon come back.\r
No need to worry!

HGSS.658.0016:
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!
This is Warden Baoba.\f
It seems there’s been a slight change
in the Pokémon at the Safari Zone!\f
It’s in the [0104,000A,0000] and the
[0104,000B,0000].\f
If you place a few objects that match
the Area, the types of Pokémon that\r
settle there change.\f
We’ve found that if you completely
remove the Area and then restore it\r
with the same objects, the original\r
Pokémon come back.\r
No need to worry!

HGSS.658.0026:
Hello?
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My apologies. The Safari Zone isn’t
quite ready yet. I’m sorry for the\r
inconvenience, but if you could be\r
patient just a little longer.\f
I’ll call you later.
HGSS.658.0027:
Hello?
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My apologies. The Safari Zone isn’t
quite ready yet. I’m sorry for the\r
inconvenience, but if you could be\r
patient just a little longer.\f
I’ll call you later.
HGSS.658.0028:
Hello?
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
The Safari Zone is now open!
Come visit anytime!\f
Do you know where it is?\f
You know the Gate inside the cavern in
Cianwood City?\f
If you go through there and walk for a
little ways, you should soon see the\r
Safari Zone!\f
Well, see you then!

HGSS.658.0030:
Hello?
Oh hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
Do you think you can catch a GEODUDE in
the Safari Zone?\f
Give it your best shot!

more time?
